info.viSezaH: DAtupAWe vidyamAnam idam gaRasUtram asti  aNgavAcakaSabdAt nirasanam' (kzepaRam cAlanam) asmin arTe RiN-pratyayaH Bavati iti asya gaRasUtrasya ASayaH  yaTA 'devadattaH hastaM nirasyati' (hastacAlanaM karoti) atra hasta-prAtipadikAt RiN-pratyayaM kftvA 'hasti' iti AtideSikaDAtuH sidDyati yena 'devadattaH hastayati' etAdfSAH prayogAH sidDyanti
